title: Collapse vector child-index parity into multiply-add plus bit test
methodology: Replaced the hot SIMD child-index update from modulo/equality/select logic with the equivalent arithmetic form 2*idx + 1 + (val & 1). In the vector loop this uses one multiply_add bundle plus one add bundle before the existing bounds-wrap step, cutting two bundles from every 8-lane chunk.
motivation: Building on exp-003-vectorize-the-batch-loop-with-8-lane-sim from the brief; loop vectorization was already successful, and the brief suggested branch/algorithmic improvement, so I targeted the per-round branch-selection math in that vectorized path.
